title: bromus segetalis var. hordeaceus
intro: Bromus segetalis var. hordeaceus, also known as cheat grass, is a subspecies of the wild grass Bromus segetalis, commonly found in Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Bromus segetalis var. hordeaceus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of health conditions.
